description:
You are the mobile build engineer responsible for monitoring the CI pipeline’s
    container fleet.  
    A text snapshot of the current container list is already stored at  
  
        /home/user/.ci/containers_running.txt  
  
    Inside that file is a single, docker-like “docker ps” table whose last column
    is the container’s NAME.  One of those rows has the NAME value exactly  
  
        mobile_builder  
  
    Your job is to record the CONTAINER ID of that specific row.  
  
    1. Read /home/user/.ci/containers_running.txt.  
    2. Locate the line whose last whitespace-delimited field (column) is
       “mobile_builder”.  
    3. Extract the first whitespace-delimited field of that same line (that is
       the 12-character CONTAINER ID).  
    4. Write that ID to a new file:  
  
           /home/user/reports/active_builder.cid  
  
       • The file must contain exactly one line.  
       • The line must be the 12-character ID followed by a single trailing
         newline “\n”.  
       • No leading or trailing spaces, no additional lines or characters.  
  
    The automated test will:  
    • Verify that /home/user/reports/active_builder.cid exists.  
    • Check that the file contains exactly one line with the correct 12-character
      ID and nothing else.  
  
    Notes  
    • /home/user/reports may not exist yet; create it if necessary.  
    • Accomplish the task with a single terminal command of your choice (you may
      chain tools with pipes).  
    • Do not modify the original
      /home/user/.ci/containers_running.txt file.  
    • You do NOT need root privileges.
truth:
Initial files/directories provided to the agent:

    1. Directory: /home/user/.ci
       Permissions: 0755, owned by user.

    2. File: /home/user/.ci/containers_running.txt
       Permissions: 0644, owned by user.
       Exact contents (including spacing and newlines):

CONTAINER ID   IMAGE                COMMAND               CREATED        STATUS          PORTS     NAMES
a1b2c3d4e5f6   mobile-app-builder   "/entrypoint.sh"      2 hours ago    Up 2 hours               mobile_builder
d7e8f9g0h1i2   test-runner          "/start.sh"           30 minutes ago Up 30 minutes            test_runner

       A single trailing newline appears after the last line above.

    3. Directory /home/user/reports does NOT exist at start.

    Expected state after correct task completion:

    • File: /home/user/reports/active_builder.cid
      Permissions: 0644 (default umask 022 is acceptable), owned by user.
      Exact contents:

a1b2c3d4e5f6\n   (that is, the 12-character ID followed by a single newline character)

    Any deviation—extra spaces, missing newline, multiple lines, wrong ID—should
    cause automated verification to fail.
name: task_000000_9bf6e95a
